name: Chez

sheet.name: Chez
sheet.background_story:
Chez looks like Chen

thats cause Chez is Chens cousin...

from his mothers side ...

but Chen doesnt like Chez cause 

1. Chez can see
2. Chez always gets clout at the forsaken grocery store from people mistaking Chez for Chen 
3. Chez sleeps with women claiming to be Chen

Chen has sent Chez to fight the headless in hopes that he fails in combat and dies a honorable death in battle ...
